name: Basic Berry Dumpling
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. Cut in the shortening; stir in milk. Knead slightly and roll out into a 12-inch square. Place diagonally in an 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan.
2. Filling: Stir together sugar, melted butter, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix in blueberries. Spoon mixture into crust. Fold corners of dough over mixture to meet in the center. Sprinkle with additional sugar.
3. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Serve warm.
